description: Module 10 Chunk 10.5 — visualize Module 9 Chunk 9.8 structured authz.deny events. Reads laravel_authz_deny_total counter (incremented by AppServiceProvider listener on every authz.deny log event). When Module 10.6 wires Loki, panels can switch to log-derived queries: count_over_time({channel='authz_audit'} |= 'authz.deny' [5m]).

panels.title: authz.deny rate by reason (req/s)
panels.description: All structured 403 events. Spikes on a specific reason (cross_workspace, no_pivot_row) indicate probing or a misconfigured client.

panels.title: Total denies last 24h
panels.description: Cumulative authz.deny events over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Denies by reason — last 1h
panels.description: Distribution of denial reasons in the last hour. Heavy `no_pivot_row` = legitimate users hitting projects they don't own. Heavy `cross_workspace` = potential attack.

panels.title: cross_workspace mismatches (req/s)
panels.description: JWT-vs-header workspace mismatch — Module 9 Chunk 9.4 multi-tenant enforcement. Non-zero rate = potential JWT spoofing or client misconfig.

panels.title: Loki transition path
panels.description: Once Module 10.6 wires Loki + Promtail, this dashboard's panels switch to LogQL: count_over_time({channel='authz_audit'} |= 'authz.deny' [5m]) [by (reason)] — same shape, log-derived. The Prometheus counter remains as a fast in-memory fallback.

options.content:
### Module 10 Chunk 10.6 follow-through

When Loki + Promtail land, replace each panel's PromQL with LogQL like:

```
sum by (reason) (
  rate({channel="authz_audit"}
    | json
    | event="authz.deny" [5m])
)
```

The `actor_user_id`, `target_workspace_id`, `target_resource` fields will then be queryable as labels — letting us drill into individual events from the chart.

title: GeoRAG — Authorization (authz.deny)
